Career Journey — Insurance & Financial Services Marketing UAE

Where I've made impact.

2023 — Present
Nexus Insurance
Group Marketing Manager

Leading insurance marketing strategy in UAE with an AI-native, full-stack approach — from GenAI-powered content and automation to performance marketing, brand growth, and lead generation across Dubai and MENA financial services.

154% LinkedIn Growth 3,400+ New Followers 10,900+ Newsletter Subscribers 265% Instagram Growth
2016 — 2023
SALAMA Insurance
Senior Marketing Specialist

Led insurance brand strategy and digital marketing transformation for SALAMA, one of the UAE's largest Islamic insurance providers — managing AED 2.1M ad spend across Google, Meta, and programmatic. Built the performance marketing function from zero, generating 20,000+ qualified leads annually.

50% Online Sales Boost 20,000+ Leads/Year 30% Brand Recognition ↑ 25% Conversion ↑
2011 — 2013
Infosys
System Engineer

Built technical foundation with SIEBEL CRM, end-to-end technical design, and full SDLC supporting global clients. This tech grounding underpins every data-driven decision today.

Hitesh Bhogal is a leading Insurance Marketing Manager and Generative AI Leader based in Dubai, UAE, specialising in financial services marketing, insurtech growth strategy, and AI-native brand transformation across the MENA and Middle East region. With over 12 years of experience managing marketing for top insurance brands including Nexus Insurance and SALAMA, Hitesh is recognised as a digital marketing expert in UAE, performance marketing leader in Dubai, and a pioneer in applying Generative AI to insurance and financial services marketing in the GCC.
